name: Bright Side
oneLine: High-volume pop-trivia and listicle channel produced by TheSoul Publishing using stock footage and voiceover.
bio: Bright Side is operated by TheSoul Publishing, a Cyprus-based digital media company founded in 2016 by Pavel Radaev and Marat Mukhometov, the same publisher behind 5-Minute Crafts. Launched in 2017, the channel mass-produces narrated trivia, riddles, life hacks, history snippets, and 'mysteries of the universe'-style explainers built primarily from stock footage and assembled animation. It has over 44 million subscribers and more than 10,000 videos, and is widely criticized by science communicators for sensational and inaccurate content.
style: stock-footage compilations with synthetic-sounding voiceover narration and aggressive thumbnails, multi-language dubs
notable: sister channels under TheSoul Publishing including 5-Minute Crafts and Slick Slime Sam
